README

AI-Powered Legal Analysis for Claude Code

legal-assistant

14 skills · 5 parallel agents · PDF reports

AI-powered contract review and legal document generation. Review contracts, flag risks,
generate NDAs, check compliance, negotiate terms, and produce client-ready PDF reports — all from Claude Code.

Every contract has hidden risks. This tool finds them in 60 seconds.

summary: This document introduces an AI-powered legal assistant built with Claude Code designed for rapid contract review and legal document generation. It highlights the tool's capabilities in identifying risks, checking compliance, negotiating terms, and producing various legal documents and reports. The document emphasizes the significant time and cost savings offered by the tool compared to traditional legal processes.
